chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-1309 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. No.7208/2023. For orders on office objections. For orders on M.A. No.7209/2023. For orders on M.A. No.7210/2023. For hearing of main case. 06-09-2023 Ms. Fatima Zahara Ansari advocate for the petitioner. ---- The petitioner has challenged the framing of issues in two consolidated Suits that is FC Suit No.470/2013 and No.454 of 2014 on the basis of pleadings of the two suits the issues were framed. The petitioner may have filed a Suit for performance of agreement but in the Suit of respondent i.e. FC Suit No.454/2014 in terms of paragraph No.6 the property was stated to have been acquired in partnership with defendant No.4 that is plaintiff of the connected Suit and petitioner herein, thus the objection to the extent of issue No.2 and 5 is of no relevance. The minor discrepancies of date could well be addressed at the time when evidence is recorded. No interference as such is required. The petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
